info.title: Oliver Partner API
info.description: API for partners to interact with Oliver

requestBody.description: Sign in credentials. You may obtain your partner authentication credentials from engineering@getoliver.com

post.description: Search for open times for a given provider, appointment type, etc. Can be used to find open times in the future or past.

parameters.name: X-Client-Id
parameters.description: The location id of the practice

parameters.name: X-Client-Id
parameters.description: The location id of the practice

parameters.name: updated_at_start
parameters.description: Start date of the range in which results were last updated

parameters.name: updated_at_end
parameters.description: End date of the range in which results were last updated. If not provided, the current date will be used.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of results per page. Max is 100.

parameters.name: X-Client-Id
parameters.description: The location id of the practice

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Optionally filter appointment types by name

get.description: Get an appointment type by ID

parameters.name: X-Client-Id
parameters.description: The location id of the practice

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the appointment type to get

parameters.name: X-Client-Id
parameters.description: The location id of the practice

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Optionally filter providers by name

parameters.name: X-Client-Id
parameters.description: The location id of the practice

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the provider to get

parameters.name: X-Client-Id
parameters.description: The location id of the practice

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter clients by name

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Filter clients by email

parameters.name: phone
parameters.description: Filter clients by phone

parameters.name: X-Client-Id
parameters.description: The location id of the practice

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the client to get

parameters.name: X-Client-Id
parameters.description: The location id of the practice

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Optionally filter rooms by name

parameters.name: X-Client-Id
parameters.description: The location id of the practice

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the room to get

get.description: List patients for a specific client. Requires client_id and optionally filters by name.

parameters.name: X-Client-Id
parameters.description: The location id of the practice

parameters.name: client_id
parameters.description: The ID of the client whose patients to list

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Optionally filter patients by name

parameters.name: X-Client-Id
parameters.description: The location id of the practice

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the patient to get

get.description: List booking sessions within a date range, optionally filtered by status. Booking sessions represent user interactions with the online booking flow.

parameters.name: X-Client-Id
parameters.description: The location id of the practice

parameters.name: updated_at_start
parameters.description: Start of the date range for filtering sessions by updated_at. ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: updated_at_end
parameters.description: End of the date range for filtering sessions by updated_at. If not provided, the current date will be used.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter sessions by status. 'active' = in progress, 'completed' = resulted in an appointment, 'abandoned' = expired without booking.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (0-based)

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of results per page

get.description: Get a booking session by ID

parameters.name: X-Client-Id
parameters.description: The location id of the practice

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the booking session to get

get.description: List staff tasks with optional status filtering and pagination

parameters.name: X-Client-Id
parameters.description: The location id of the practice

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter tasks by status. Available values: `pending`, `completed`, `canceled`

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of results per page. Max is 100.

parameters.name: X-Client-Id
parameters.description: The location id of the practice

get.description: Get a staff task by ID

parameters.name: X-Client-Id
parameters.description: The location id of the practice

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the staff task

put.description: Update a staff task. Only provided fields will be updated.

parameters.name: X-Client-Id
parameters.description: The location id of the practice

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the staff task to update

requestBody.description: Fields to update on the staff task

delete.description: Delete a staff task. This performs a soft delete by setting the status to canceled.

parameters.name: X-Client-Id
parameters.description: The location id of the practice

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the staff task to delete

search_from_date.description: The start date/time of the search in ISO 8601 format. Can be a present or future timestamp.

appointment_type.description: An string of the appointment type category. Available options: `wellness`, `sick`, `technician`, `recheck`.

date.description: The date of this result in MM/DD/YYYY format

available.description: Whether this result has open times

times.description: An array of open times for this date

start.description: The start time of this result formatted as 2025-01-01T16:00:00-06:00

end.description: The end time of this result formatted as 2025-01-01T16:20:00-06:00 (20 minutes after the start time)

provider_id.description: The ID of the provider that this result is for

room_id.description: The ID of the room that this result is for, if applicable

appointment_type_ids.description: The IDs of the appointment types that this result is available for

value.description: The time value of this result formatted like 16:00

label.description: The label of this result formatted like 4:00 pm

uuid.description: The slot identifier for this result. Pass this as `slot_id` to the Create Appointment endpoint along with client and patient information to book this time.

slot_id.description: The slot identifier returned from the Search Open Times endpoint (the `uuid` field). Encodes the appointment type, provider, room, and time.

client_id.description: The internal Oliver ID of the client. Provide this, `client_remote_id`, or name + contact fields.

client_remote_id.description: The PIMS remote ID of the client. Alternative to `client_id`.

first_name.description: Client first name. Must be combined with `last_name` and either `phone` or `email`.

last_name.description: Client last name. Must be combined with `first_name` and either `phone` or `email`.

phone.description: Client phone number. Used with `first_name` + `last_name` to look up the client.

email.description: Client email. Used with `first_name` + `last_name` to look up the client.

patient_id.description: The internal Oliver ID of the patient. Provide this or `patient_remote_id`.

patient_remote_id.description: The PIMS remote ID of the patient. Alternative to `patient_id`.

status.description: Appointment status override. If omitted, the clinic's auto-accept setting determines the status.

id.description: The internal Oliver ID of the appointment

remote_id.description: The PIMS remote ID of the appointment, if synced

remote_client_id.description: The PIMS remote ID of the client

remote_patient_id.description: The PIMS remote ID of the patient

booking_date.description: The start date/time of the appointment in ISO 8601 format

end_date.description: The end date/time of the appointment in ISO 8601 format

created_at.description: When the appointment was created in ISO 8601 format

updated_at.description: When the appointment was last updated in ISO 8601 format

client_type.description: Whether the client is NEW or RETURNING

message.description: A human-readable message, e.g. 'Appointment created successfully'

remote_id.description: The remote ID of the appointment (The ID in the PIMS)

booking_date.description: The start date/time of the appointment in ISO 8601 format

end_date.description: The end date/time of the appointment in ISO 8601 format

created_at.description: The date/time the appointment was created in ISO 8601 format

updated_at.description: The date/time the appointment was last updated in ISO 8601 format

referral_source.description: If a referral source (utm_source) was provided to the session in which the appointment was booked online, it will be returned here

referral_campaign.description: If a referral campaign (utm_campaign) was provided to the session in which the appointment was booked online, it will be returned here

referral_medium.description: If a referral medium (utm_medium) was provided to the session in which the appointment was booked online, it will be returned here

client_first_name.description: The first name of the client that booked the appointment

client_last_name.description: The last name of the client that booked the appointment

client_email.description: The email address of the client that booked the appointment

client_phone.description: The phone number of the client that booked the appointment

client_type.description: The type of client that booked the appointment. 'NEW' or 'RETURNING'

patient_name.description: The name of the patient that booked the appointment

remote_client_id.description: The remote ID of the client in the PIMS

remote_patient_id.description: The remote ID of the patient in the PIMS

id.description: The ID of the appointment type

name.description: The name of the appointment type

duration.description: The duration of the appointment type in minutes

provider_ids.description: The IDs of the providers that can service this appointment type

appointment_type_ids.description: The IDs of the appointment types that this provider offers

room_ids.description: The IDs of the rooms that this provider can be booked into. Empty if rooms are not applicable for this provider.

email.description: The email address of the client

phone.description: The phone number of the client

patients.description: List of patients associated with this client

remote_id.description: The ID of the client in the remote system it was imported from, if available

client_id.description: The ID of the client that owns this patient

total_count.description: Total number of matching booking sessions

id.description: The unique ID of the booking session

status.description: The status of the session. 'active' = in progress, 'completed' = resulted in an appointment, 'abandoned' = expired without booking.

stage.description: The furthest stage the user reached in the booking flow

client_type.description: Whether the client was new or returning. Null if not yet determined.

appointment_id.description: The ID of the appointment created by this session, if completed

remote_appointment_id.description: The ID of the remote appointment created by this session, if completed

referral_source.description: The referral source (utm_source) associated with this session

referral_campaign.description: The referral campaign (utm_campaign) associated with this session

referral_medium.description: The referral medium (utm_medium) associated with this session

created_at.description: The date/time the session was created in ISO 8601 format

updated_at.description: The date/time the session was last updated in ISO 8601 format

last_activity_at.description: The date/time of the last user activity in the session in ISO 8601 format

id.description: The unique ID of the staff task

status.description: The current status of the task

description.description: A detailed description of the task

client_id.description: The ID of the client associated with this task

patient_id.description: The ID of the patient associated with this task

cancellation_allowed.description: Whether the task can be canceled

override_completion_action_text.description: Custom text for the completion action button, if set

reference_time_at.description: A reference timestamp associated with the task in ISO 8601 format

finalized_at.description: The timestamp when the task was completed or canceled in ISO 8601 format

created_at.description: The timestamp when the task was created in ISO 8601 format

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the task was last updated in ISO 8601 format

description.description: A detailed description of the task

task_type.description: The type of staff task. Defaults to `task` if not provided. Allowed values: `task`, `rx_refill`

client_id.description: The ID of the client to associate with this task

patient_id.description: The ID of the patient to associate with this task

reference_time_at.description: A reference timestamp for the task in ISO 8601 format

description.description: A detailed description of the task

task_type.description: The type of staff task. Allowed values: `task`, `rx_refill`

status.description: The status of the task. Setting to `completed` or `canceled` will automatically set `finalized_at`. Setting back to `pending` will clear `finalized_at`.

client_id.description: The ID of the client to associate with this task

patient_id.description: The ID of the patient to associate with this task

reference_time_at.description: A reference timestamp for the task in ISO 8601 format
